data.title: Elme Communities updates liquidation progress, 3 properties sold, aiming to close remaining 10 by Q1 2026, projected total distribution of $17.02 - $17.47 per share.
data.description: A company has finalized agreements for the purchase and sale of three out of the ten remaining properties, scheduled to be completed by the first quarter of 2026. The company aims to conclude all outstanding sales by mid-year 2026. The estimated total liquidating distributions have been revised to a range of $17.02 to $17.47 per share, inclusive of the initial $14.67 per share distributed in January 2026.

data.title: Roivant to host conference call on February 6, 2026, to report Q3 financial results ended December 31, 2025.
data.description: Roivant (Nasdaq: ROIV) has revealed plans to hold a live conference call and webcast on Friday, February 6, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. The call will cover the financial results for the second quarter finishing on December 31, 2026. This announcement was made from BASEL, Switzerland, LONDON, and NEW YORK, and aims to offer insight into the company's performance and provide a business update.

data.title: Lake Shore Bancorp declares $0.09 dividend per share on common stock, payable on Feb. 11 to stockholders as of Feb. 2.
data.description: In Dunkirk, NY, on Jan. 23, 2026, Lake Shore Bancorp, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.09 per share on its common stock (NASDAQ: LSBK) on Jan. 21, 2026. The dividend is set to be paid on Feb. 11, 2026, to shareholders of record as of Feb. 2, 2026.

data.title: Black Hills Corp. raises quarterly dividend to $0.703 per share from $0.676, for shareholders of record by Feb. 17.
data.description: Today, Black Hills Corp. (NYSE: BKH) revealed that its board of directors has sanctioned a quarterly dividend of $0.703 per share, marking a rise of $0.027 per share from the prior quarter. Shareholders registered as of Feb. 17, 2026, will be eligible to obtain $0.703 per share, with the payment scheduled for March 1, 2026.

data.title: Eaton acquires Ultra PCS Limited from Cobham Ultra Group for $1.55 billion, strengthening aerospace solutions.
data.description: Eaton, a leading intelligent power management company listed on NYSE as ETN, has recently finalized the acquisition of Ultra PCS Limited from Cobham Ultra Group. This strategic move aims to enhance Eaton's offerings for military and civilian aircraft, particularly in safety and mission critical aerospace systems. The acquisition cost Eaton $1.55 billion. This deal positions Eaton strongly in the aerospace industry, expanding its product portfolio with cutting-edge solutions catered to vital aerospace platforms.

data.title: Essential Utilities Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) declares $0.3426 quarterly cash dividend, payable March 2, 2026 - 80 years of consistent payouts.
data.description: Essential Utilities Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) based in Bryn Mawr, PA, has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3426 per share on February 9, 2026. The payment will be made to all shareholders of record on March 2, 2026. Having a remarkable track record, the company has paid consecutive quarterly cash dividends for an impressive 80 years. Furthermore, they have increased the dividend 35 times in the last 34 years. Essential Utilities, Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) is known for offering safe, clean, and reliable services that enhance the overall quality of life.

data.title: UMH Properties, Inc. reports tax treatment for 2025 distributions to its stockholders. Check out detailed tables!
data.description: UMH Properties, Inc. disclosed the tax treatment of its 2025 distributions on January 23, 2026. The distributions, allocated for income tax purposes, were paid to holders of UMH's common and preferred shares throughout the year ending on December 31, 2025. The data provided by UMH Properties, Inc. (NYSE: UMH) (TASE: UMH) outlines the nature of cash distributions made during the said period.

data.title: Vistra to announce Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb. 26 at 10 a.m. ET (9 a.m. CT), NYSE: VST.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Vistra, listed on the NYSE under VST, announced its intentions to disclose its financial and operating performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 26, 2026. The presentation will take place via a live conference call and webcast at 10 a.m. ET (9 a.m. CT). Access to the live webcast will be available for stakeholders.

data.title: Binance to reintroduce tokenized equities after pausing trading in 2021 following regulatory concerns. #Cryptocurrency #Stocks #Trading
data.description: In 2021, for a short period, a crypto exchange provided tokenized versions of cryptocurrency and technology company stocks until trading was stopped due to regulatory scrutiny.

data.title: Dow drops by 300 points as Nasdaq leads with a gain; Nvidia up. Nasdaq strongest of major indexes.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline despite a notable increase in Nvidia. Among the major indexes, the Nasdaq displayed the strongest performance. The market today saw the Dow losing 300 points, with the Nasdaq leading with a gain. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily in their live coverage of the stock market.

data.title: The Financial Technology Report reveals Top Financial Technology CEOs of 2025 in New York - a notable achievement in the industry.
data.description: The Financial Technology Report is excited to reveal the top CEOs in the financial technology industry for 2025. This announcement was made on January 23, 2026, in New York. Fintech is currently navigating through a challenging landscape with increasing expectations.

data.title: The Software Report reveals Top Software CEOs of 2025 in New York with significant impact on industry.
data.description: The top Software CEOs of 2025 have been revealed by The Software Report. The announcement was made in New York on January 23, 2026. This list showcases the leaders who have excelled in the software industry over the past year. As software continues to evolve and become a crucial part of modern infrastructure, it is essential to recognize the individuals who have made significant contributions. This report highlights the top CEOs in the field, acknowledging their hard work and innovation. Stay updated on the latest developments in the software industry by following The Software Report.

data.title: Top Healthcare Technology CEOs of 2025 revealed by The Healthcare Technology Report. New York, Jan. 23, 2026 - showcasing industry innovators shaping healthcare trends.
data.description: The Top Healthcare Technology CEOs of 2025 have been revealed by The Healthcare Technology Report. A recent announcement made in New York on Jan. 23, 2026, highlighted the top-performing CEOs in the healthcare technology sector. The report emphasized the key achievements and innovations made by these CEOs in 2025, showcasing their leadership abilities and impact on the industry. This recognition shed light on the significant advancements and growth in healthcare technology, illustrating the dedication and success of these executives in navigating the evolving healthcare landscape.

data.title: Lululemon founder criticizes company's board over see-through leggings, stock price falls.
data.description: Chip Wilson, the founder of Lululemon Athletica, Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU), has criticized the company's board of directors for recent quality control issues, labeling them as a "new low" for the yoga-wear giant. Wilson, the largest individual shareholder despite stepping down years ago, slammed the board's management in a viral LinkedIn post. He specifically highlighted see-through leggings and declining product standards as the consequence of the board's actions. LULU stock is currently experiencing a decline. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TruTrade aids traders in accessing capital with focus on scalable infrastructure amid global market competition.
data.description: In Scottsdale, Arizona on January 23, 2026, a growing trend is emerging among traders where the emphasis is moving away from relying solely on strategy to now focusing on building a scalable capital infrastructure. This change is happening as global financial markets become more competitive. Both professional traders and independent traders are realizing the importance of this shift. Success in the trading world is no longer just about having a solid strategy; it now also involves having a capital infrastructure that can adapt and grow with the market. This adjustment reflects the evolving landscape of the financial markets where agility and scalability are becoming key factors for traders to remain competitive.

data.title: International Paper sells Global Cellulose Fibers business to American Industrial Partners. Transaction completed on Jan. 23, 2026..timeScale
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee on January 23, 2026, International Paper, a prominent player in sustainable packaging solutions, finalized the sale of its Global Cellulose Fibers (GCF) division to funds connected with American Industrial Partners (AIP). This move signifies a shift in the company's focus towards other endeavors. International Paper's stocks are listed under NYSE: IP and LSE: IPC.

data.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust revealed the tax status of 2025 distributions to Common Share holders, including Preferred.
data.description: In North Bethesda, Maryland on January 23, 2026, Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE: FRT) announced the Federal income tax treatment information regarding the 2025 distributions for holders of its Common Shares of Beneficial Interest (NYSE: FRT) and its 5.000% Series C Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The disclosure covers details on how these distributions will be treated for tax purposes in the specified year.

data.title: NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS) reports positive results at an extraordinary general meeting in Langfang, Hebei Province on Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, NaaS Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: NAAS), the pioneering U.S.-listed EV charging service provider in China, disclosed positive outcomes from its extraordinary general meeting of shareholders convened in Langfang, Hebei Province.

data.title: XTL Biopharmaceuticals Ltd received a Nasdaq notification due to a stockholders' equity deficiency of $47,000 on Jan 20, 2026.
data.description: XTL Biopharmaceuticals Ltd. received a notification from Nasdaq on January 20, 2026, stating that the company does not currently meet the continued listing requirement to maintain a minimum of $2,500,000 in stockholders' equity as per Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(b)(1). The notification was based on the company's Form 6-K, dated December 30, 2025, showing a stockholders' equity deficit of $47,000 for the period ended June 30, 2025. As of January 20, 2026, the company also did not meet the alternatives of market value of listed securities or net income from continuing operations. This news came from XTL Biopharmaceuticals Ltd., listed on Nasdaq as XTLB and on TASE as XTLB.TA, headquartered in Ramat Gan, Israel.

data.title: AGM Group secured US$25M Equity Line of Credit Facility with 24-month term and 5-year warrant ($2.4639/exercise).
data.description: A company called AGMH, which is listed on a US stock exchange and specializes in making crypto ASICs and high-performance servers, has recently obtained a US$25 million ELOC (Equity Line of Credit). This credit facility has a term of 24 months and includes a 5-year warrant that allows the purchase of company stock at $2.4639 per share. The funds from this ELOC are designated for corporate use by AGMH.
